name: Incomplete Identification of Uploaded File Variables (PHP)
description: PHP applications use outdated global variable methods for file uploads that attackers can overwrite through POST requests or cookies, enabling processing of unauthorized files and arbitrary file access.
detection_pattern: INGRESS(file_upload) flows to TRANSFORM using global variables that EXTERNAL actor can overwrite via INGRESS(POST/cookie), without CONTROL node using PHP superglobals ($_FILES) for upload verification
